forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely and patchy fog. Cloudy. High near 58, with temperatures falling to around 56 in the afternoon. North northeast wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Rain Showers then Patchy Fog
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog before 8pm, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy. Low around 51, with temperatures rising to around 53 overnight. West northwest wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.shortForecast: Patchy Fog then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 9am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. High near 74, with temperatures falling to around 70 in the afternoon. South southwest wind 3 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Sunday Night
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 8pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. West northwest wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
